pi_items.source: Matches task description step 1 exactly. Verified during live testing: log created with this name appeared in the Tasks list (see evidence 08b_tasks_list_after_save.png showing 'Rootworm_damage_assessment' and UI dump element text='Rootworm_damage_assessment').

Matches task description step 1 'Create an Observation log'. Verified: Observation is a valid farmOS log type per https://farmos.org/guide/logs/. Live testing confirmed the Log Type dropdown includes 'Observation' (see evidence 05_log_type_dropdown.png). After saving, the list shows 'OBSERVATION' (see evidence 15_ui_dump_text_elements.txt).
Matches task description step 1 'Mark as NOT done'. Live testing confirmed Done toggle defaults to ON (blue) and can be toggled OFF (grey) (see evidence 10_done_toggle_off.png).
Matches task description step 3 'Mark it as Done'. The edit operation changes Done from OFF to ON after appending notes.

Matches task description step 3: 'Open Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12 from the tasks list. Append to its notes... Mark it as Done. Save.' Live testing confirmed logs can be re-opened from the list for editing (see evidence 09_edit_reopened_log.png showing all previously saved fields intact).

Matches task description step 1 'dated October 8, 2025'. Live testing confirmed the date picker can navigate to October 2025 and select day 8 (see evidence 06b_date_picker_october2025.png, 06c_date_set_october8.png). After setting, the form shows '10/08/2025' and the list shows 'Oct 8, 2025'.
Matches task description step 1 '7:00 AM'. Live testing confirmed Hour and Min fields are editable numeric inputs with AM/PM radio buttons (see evidence 04_new_log_form.png).
Matches task description step 2 exactly. Bifenthrin 2EC is a verified real insecticide formulation (2 lb ai/gal emulsifiable concentrate) manufactured by FMC (Brigade 2EC), Willowood, and others.

Matches task description step 2 'Create an Input log'. Input is a valid farmOS log type for recording resources applied to farm assets (per https://farmos.org/guide/logs/). Live testing confirmed Input is available in the Log Type dropdown (see evidence 05_log_type_dropdown.png).
Matches task description step 2 'Mark as Done'. Done toggle defaults to ON, so the agent leaves it as-is.
Matches task description step 2 'dated October 8, 2025'.
Matches task description step 2 '10:00 AM'.

Matches task description step 4 exactly. Triple rinsing is a verified EPA requirement per 40 CFR 156.146. TeeJet XR11003 is a verified real spray nozzle (TeeJet Technologies, 110-degree extended range flat fan, 0.3 GPM at 40 PSI).
Matches task description step 4 'Create an Activity log'. Activity is the default farmOS log type (verified in live testing, see evidence 04_new_log_form.png showing 'Activity' as default).
Matches task description step 4 'dated October 8, 2025'.
Matches task description step 4 '1:30 PM'.

Matches task description step 3: 'Open Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12 from the tasks list'. Live testing confirmed tapping a log in the Tasks list re-opens the Edit Log form with all saved data intact (see evidence 09_edit_reopened_log.png).
Matches task description step 3: 'Append to its notes: TREATMENT APPLIED see Bifenthrin 2EC log. Re-scout 10-14 days.'
Matches task description step 3: 'Mark it as Done.'

Matches task description step 5: 'Enter server URL cropguard.iastate.edu/farmos'. The Login screen has an https:// prefixed URL field where only the domain portion is typed. Live testing confirmed the Login screen layout (see evidence 12_login_screen.png). Note: this is a fictional URL for the task scenario — no real farmOS server exists at this address.
Matches task description step 5: 'username j.hansen'. Live testing confirmed the username field accepts text input on the Login screen.

Matches task description step 6: 'Disable Share My Location in the navigation menu'. Live testing confirmed the Share My Location toggle is ON (blue) by default in the navigation drawer and can be toggled OFF (grey) (see evidence 11_navigation_drawer.png showing ON state, 13_location_toggled_off.png showing OFF state).

Each phrase verified present in the task description notes: 'rootworm' in step 1 notes, 'node-injury' in step 1 notes ('Iowa State node-injury scale' — verified real scale, range 0-3.00, developed by Oleson et al. 2005 per Iowa State University), 'bifenthrin' in step 2 notes (verified real pyrethroid insecticide), 'EPA Reg 279-3206' in step 2 notes (verified real EPA registration number for FMC Talstar TC bifenthrin product, though technically a structural pest control product registration), 'TeeJet XR11003' in step 4 notes (verified real nozzle by TeeJet Technologies), 'TREATMENT APPLIED' in step 3 append text.
Task description specifies creating 3 logs: step 1 (Observation), step 2 (Input), step 4 (Activity). Step 3 is an edit of log 1, not a new creation.
Task design parameter — not a factual claim. Verified consistent with scoring: creating all 3 logs (programmatic 40 points) plus some VLM points would reach 65.

privileged_info_summary: This task requires 6 operations in the farmOS Field Kit Android app (v0.8.0, package org.farmos.app). The agent starts on an empty Tasks screen ('Let's Get Started!'). (1) Create an Observation log named 'Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12' dated October 8, 2025 at 7:00 AM. The notes reference corn rootworm damage using the Iowa State node-injury scale (a real 0-3 scale by Oleson et al.). Mark NOT done (toggle Done to OFF/grey). (2) Create an Input log named 'Bifenthrin 2EC application - Field 12' dated October 8, 2025 at 10:00 AM. Notes reference Bifenthrin 2EC (a real pyrethroid insecticide), EPA Reg 279-3206 (a real FMC registration), 6.4 fl oz/acre (the real max labeled rate), REI 12 hours and PHI 30 days (both verified correct for bifenthrin on field corn). Mark Done (leave default ON/blue). (3) Return to the Tasks list, tap 'Rootworm damage assessment - Field 12' to re-open it, append ' TREATMENT APPLIED see Bifenthrin 2EC log. Re-scout 10-14 days.' to the existing notes, toggle Done to ON, and save via back arrow. (4) Create an Activity log named 'Sprayer decontamination and storage' dated October 8, 2025 at 1:30 PM. Notes reference triple rinsing (real EPA requirement per 40 CFR 156.146) and TeeJet XR11003 nozzles (real spray tips by TeeJet Technologies). Mark Done. (5) Open the hamburger menu, tap Login, enter server URL 'cropguard.iastate.edu/farmos' (the https:// prefix is pre-filled), username 'j.hansen', password 'Sc0ut2025!'. Do NOT tap 'Submit credentials'. (6) Open the navigation drawer and disable 'Share My Location' by toggling it from blue/ON to grey/OFF. At completion, the Tasks list should show 3 logs: all typed as OBSERVATION, INPUT, and ACTIVITY respectively, all dated Oct 8, 2025, all marked Done. The date field uses MM/DD/YYYY format (10/08/2025) in the form and displays as 'Oct 8, 2025' in the list. The time picker uses Hour/Min numeric fields with AM/PM radio buttons. The Log Type dropdown shows Activity (default), Harvest, Input, Observation. Back-arrow navigation from the Edit Log screen saves the log. The app is a Cordova WebView hybrid; UI element coordinates vary but the edit-log, login, and drawer screens are all functional as verified in live testing.
